body_txt: A Crazy-Prepared or Disaster Scavenger character makes body armour or a shield out of materials to hand , quite possibly to back up an Improvised Weapon . Indicates that the character, at least, doesn't think Armour Is Useless . Related to Pocket Protector , a protection unknown to the audience which is therefore much more likely to save your life . As stated earlier this trope also covers improvised shields , which usually tend to be metal trash can lids, pot lids, doors (both car and house doors) or anything that is big, tough, circular/square/rectangular and has a handle. Although the circular ones can be very useful for throwing . Expect to see a lot of this in a Scavenger World or as part of a Scavenged Punk setting. May be donned as part of a Lock-and-Load Montage . See also DIY Threat Detection . Bucket Helmet is a popular Sub-Trope .
